title: IPC Message Passing Between Processes
interaction_flow: CallerApp → ExecService: IPC call 'launchApp'({app_name, args, pseudonym, file_paths, items}, ipc_context)
ExecService → ExecService: extract caller process from ipc_context.caller.process
ExecService → IPCService: add_connection({source: process.uuid, target: child_instance_id})
IPCService → IPCService: create forward conn (uuid) + backward conn (r_uuid) in connections_ map
ExecService → launch_app: launch_app({name, uuid:child_instance_id, parent_instance_id, parent_pseudo_id: connection.backward.uuid, args, ...})
launch_app → ExecService: return child_launch_outcome {launchResult, references: {iframe, el_win}}
ChildProcess → ExecService: ipc_status changes to PROCESS_IPC_ATTACHED (onchange listener)
ExecService → CallerApp (iframe): postMessage({msg:'childAppLaunched', original_msg_id, child_instance_id, uses_sdk:true}, '*')
BroadcastService (GUI) → ChildProcess (iframe): postMessage({msg:'broadcast', name, data}, '*') [for each saved broadcast]
ExecService → CallerApp (iframe): postMessage({msg:'appClosed', appInstanceID: connection.forward.uuid, statusCode:0}, '*')
ExecService → ExecService: report_app_closed(child_process.uuid) [if not sdk app]
ExecService → CallerApp: return {appInstanceID: connection.forward.uuid, usesSDK:true, response?}
CallerApp → ExecService: IPC call 'connectToInstance'({app_name, args}, ipc_context)
ExecService → ExecService: verify caller (must be 'phoenix'), verify target (must be 'puter-linux')
ExecService → IPCService: add_connection({source: caller_process.uuid, target: process.uuid})
ExecService → CallerApp: return {appInstanceID: connection.forward.uuid, usesSDK:true, response}
key_relationships: ExecService depends_on IPCService (registers ipc handlers 'launchApp', 'connectToInstance' at _init)
ExecService depends_on BroadcastService (GUI) (calls sendSavedBroadcastsTo on child IPC attach)
ExecService depends_on ProcessService (gets processes by uuid/name)
ExecService depends_on launch_app helper (actual app launching logic)
InternalConnection depends_on ProcessService (to resolve target process by uuid)
IPCService stores bidirectional connections: forward (caller→child) + backward (child→caller)
BroadcastService (GUI) stores saved broadcasts in #broadcastsToSendToNewAppInstances Map
Backend BroadcastService listens to outer.* events, forwards to peers via webhook + Redis pub/sub

IPCService: add_connection({source, target}): {forward, backward} — creates UUID pair, stores both directions
get_connection(uuid): InternalConnection — lazy-instantiates from stored entry
register_ipc_handler(name, spec): void — sets window.ipc_handlers[name] = spec
InternalConnection: send(data): void — resolves target process, calls process.send({returnAddress: reverse}, data)
ExecService: launchApp({app_name, args, pseudonym, file_paths, items}, {ipc_context, msg_id}): {appInstanceID, usesSDK, response?}
BroadcastService_GUI: sendBroadcast(name, data, {sendToNewAppInstances?}): void — postMessage to all SDK iframes
sendSavedBroadcastsTo(appInstanceID): void — replay saved broadcasts to new app via postMessage
BroadcastService_Backend: outBroadcastEventHandler(key, data, meta): void — queues outer.* events for outbound flush
#flushOutboundEvents(): Promise — sends batched events to all webhook peers
#sendWebhookToPeer(peer_config, events): Promise — HMAC-signed POST to peer webhook_url
#handleWebhookRequest(req, res): Promise — validates HMAC sig, nonce, timestamp; emits events locally
#handleRedisPubSubMessage(channel, message): Promise — fan-out from Redis to local event emitter

connection_model.parent_pseudo_id: connection.backward.uuid — passed to child at launch so child can address parent
connection_model.appInstanceID_returned: connection.forward.uuid — returned to caller as handle to child

ipc_attachment_trigger: PROCESS_IPC_ATTACHED constant; child signals readiness by changing ipc_status; ExecService.onchange listener fires send_child_launched_msg and BroadcastService.sendSavedBroadcastsTo
important_notes: send_child_launched_msg is a closure inside launchApp — it captures process, msg_id, child_instance_id
connectToInstance has hardcoded permission check: only 'phoenix' → 'puter-linux' allowed
Backend BroadcastService is separate from GUI BroadcastService — backend handles cross-node via Redis/webhooks
Backend webhook uses HMAC-SHA256 with timestamp+nonce replay protection and 300s window
GUI BroadcastService stores saved broadcasts in a Map (name → data); later replaced by same-name updates
